profile.title: Profile
profile.description: The name, photo and contact details we show across Qeet ID.

picture.label: Profile picture
picture.help: PNG or JPG; a square image works best. Applied when you save.
picture.errorProcess: Couldn't process that image — try a different file.

profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How you'd like to be addressed
profile.emailHelp: Change your email from the security tab — it requires re-verification.

security.title: Security
security.description: Password, two-factor authentication, and active sessions for your account.

password.title: Password
password.description: Use a strong, unique password. We recommend a password manager.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Faster, phishing-resistant sign-in using Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, or a security key.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add a second factor (authenticator app, SMS, or email code) to require a second step on every sign-in.

connected.title: Connected accounts
connected.description: Social and identity providers linked to your account. You can sign in with any of them; unlink the ones you no longer use.
connected.empty: No connected accounts. Link one by signing in with a provider from the sign-in screen.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: All devices and browsers currently signed in to your account. Revoke any you don't recognise.

active.title: Active sessions
active.description: Every place you're currently signed in. Revoke any session you don't recognise.

revoke.title: Revoke this session?
revoke.description: Whoever holds it will be signed out.
revoke.label: Revoke
revoke.selfHelp: Use the sign-out menu to end the session you're currently using.

revokeAll.description: This won't sign you out of this browser.
revokeAll.label: Sign out elsewhere

data.title: Data
data.description: Export or delete your personal data.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: We'll prepare a JSON / CSV archive of everything we store about your account and email you a one-time download link.

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.description: Removes your account and personal data after a 30-day grace period. Audit-log references are kept (with PII redacted) so administrators can still verify historical events.

confirm.title: Schedule account for deletion?
confirm.description: You can cancel within 30 days by signing back in.
confirm.label: Delete my account
